code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}}}%%

sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant UI as React UI
    participant Upload as upload-document
    participant Storage as Supabase Storage
    participant Gemini as Google Gemini
    participant DB as Database
    participant Trigger as trigger-validation
    participant Validate as validate-assessment
    participant Query as query-document

    Note over User,Query: Document Upload & Indexing

    User->>UI: Upload PDF Assessment
    UI->>Upload: POST /upload-document
    Upload->>Storage: Store PDF file
    Storage-->>Upload: File URL
    Upload->>DB: Create validation_detail record
    Upload->>Gemini: Index document
    Gemini-->>Upload: Indexing started
    Upload->>DB: Create gemini_operations record
    Upload-->>UI: Upload complete
    UI-->>User: Show "Processing..."

    Note over User,Query: Automatic Validation Trigger

    Gemini->>DB: Update gemini_operations (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    DB->>Trigger: Database trigger fires
    Trigger->>DB: Check all operations complete
    DB-->>Trigger: All complete
    Trigger->>Validate: POST /validate-assessment
    Trigger->>DB: Log trigger attempt
    Validate->>DB: Update status to "ProcessingInBackground"

    Note over User,Query: Validation Process

    Validate->>DB: Fetch UOC requirements
    DB-->>Validate: Requirements list
    
    loop For each requirement
        Validate->>Query: Query assessment for requirement
        Query->>Gemini: Search indexed document
        Gemini-->>Query: Relevant passages
        Query-->>Validate: Citations
        Validate->>Gemini: Validate requirement
        Gemini-->>Validate: Status + Reasoning
        Validate->>DB: Store validation_result
    end

    Validate->>DB: Update validation_detail (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    Validate-->>Trigger: Validation complete
    DB->>UI: Real-time update (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
    UI-->>User: Show "Complete" with results

    Note over User,Query: View Results & Regenerate Questions

    User->>UI: Click validation to view results
    UI->>DB: Fetch validation_results
    DB-->>UI: All results
    UI-->>User: Display results

    alt Regenerate Smart Question
        User->>UI: Click "Regenerate" with context
        UI->>Validate: POST /regenerate-smart-questions
        Validate->>Query: Query assessment
        Query->>Gemini: Search with context
        Gemini-->>Query: Passages
        Validate->>Gemini: Generate question
        Gemini-->>Validate: New smart question
        Validate->>DB: Update validation_result
        DB->>UI: Real-time update
        UI-->>User: Show new question
    end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个完整的文档上传和自动验证流程，核心场景是工业IoT设备评估。用户上传PDF后，系统要自动触发Gemini索引，然后后台完成合规性验证。我想把IoT工业场景里的EdgeNode、MQTT Broker、ActuatorController这些设备类型都纳入验证范围。
明白，所以上传流程是：用户→UI→上传服务→存Storage→调Gemini建索引，同时写数据库记录。但自动触发验证的机制我有点疑问——是Gemini索引完成后直接触发，还是通过数据库触发器？另外三个IoT设备类型是验证时的不同评估对象吗？
对，用数据库触发器更可靠。Gemini索引完成后更新gemini_operations表，触发器检测到所有操作完成（比如EdgeNode索引好了），才调validate-assessment。三个设备类型是验证过程中会分别处理的业务实体，但验证服务是统一的。验证时要循环查UOC要求，对每个要求去索引文档里找依据。
好的，我梳理一下验证循环：validate-assessment先从数据库取UOC要求列表，然后对每个要求，调query-document去Gemini搜索引过的PDF，拿到引用片段和依据，再让Gemini判断合规性，结果存validation_result。全部完成后更新validation_detail，同时通过MQTT Broker相关的状态推送让UI实时刷新。这样对吗？
没错，而且用户看完结果后，还能针对具体验证点重新生成智能问题。这时候走另一条分支：用户点"重新生成"，UI调validate-assessment的regenerate接口，还是经过query-document查Gemini，但这一次是带着上下文生成新问题，再更新到validation_result里，UI实时展示。
我来画一下完整流程。主泳道分三块：上传索引、自动触发验证、查看结果与重生成。注意点：Upload服务要同时写validation_detail和gemini_operations两张表；Trigger是数据库触发器不是独立服务；验证循环里Query和Gemini有两次交互，一次查引用一次做判断。我标注了IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController作为实时推送的触发点。
稍等，trigger-validation到validate-assessment的调用方向反了，应该是Trigger主动POST调Validate，不是Validate拉Trigger。还有，Gemini索引完成时更新的是gemini_operations里的EdgeNode状态，这个要写清楚。另外实时更新那块，DB到UI的箭头应该标注下是通过什么机制，比如Supabase Realtime？
已修正：Trigger POST调Validate，方向正确了。gemini_operations更新标注了EdgeNode。实时更新我加了备注说明是Supabase Realtime机制，对应ActuatorController的状态推送。验证完成时validation_detail更新关联到MQTT Broker。整个流程现在闭环了，从上传PDF到最终展示验证结果和智能问题重生成。
可以，这个流程覆盖了完整的工业IoT文档评估场景。三个设备类型在各自阶段发挥作用：EdgeNode标记索引完成，MQTT Broker关联验证状态持久化，ActuatorController驱动前端实时反馈。准备定稿。
